name: CRUD/create
description: Conformance tests for POST /{type} create semantics: assigned id/version metadata and headers, client-supplied id/meta overriding, content-type and body validation, malicious-input handling, and the X-Provenance header (from CreateTests).

variable.name: basicId
variable.description: id assigned to the basic create test's Observation

variable.name: basicVersionId
variable.description: meta.versionId assigned to the basic create test's Observation

variable.name: clientMetaId
variable.description: server-assigned id for the client-supplied-id/meta test (differs from the fixture's fhir262-create-clientid)

variable.name: precisionId
variable.description: id assigned to the high-precision quantity Observation

variable.name: maliciousUrlId
variable.description: id assigned to the Observation created via a query string containing malicious content

variable.name: safeNarrativeId
variable.description: id assigned to the Observation with a sanitizable (non-tag) narrative payload

variable.name: provenanceOkId
variable.description: id assigned to the Observation created alongside a valid X-Provenance header

test.name: create returns 201 with id, version, and location metadata
test.description: POST /Observation must return 201 Created with an assigned id/version and ETag, Location, and Last-Modified response headers.

operation.description: POST a basic Observation

assert.description: Server must return 201 Created
Response body must be an Observation
Server must have assigned an id
Server must have assigned a meta.versionId
Server must have assigned a meta.lastUpdated
ETag header must be present
ETag header must reflect the assigned version
Location header must be present and point at the versioned history URL
Location header must reference the Observation type
Last-Modified header must be present

test.name: create ignores client-supplied id and meta
test.description: POST an Observation with a client-supplied id and meta.versionId; the server must assign its own values and ignore the client-supplied ones.

operation.description: POST Observation with client-supplied id and meta

assert.description: Server must return 201 Created
Server must NOT echo the client-supplied id
Server must NOT echo the client-supplied meta.versionId
Server must have assigned a non-empty id

test.name: create to an unrecognized resource type returns 404
test.description: POST to an unrecognized resource type endpoint must return 404 Not Found.

operation.description: POST to /NotObservation

assert.description: Server must return 404 Not Found for an unrecognized resource type

test.name: create with an unsupported Content-Type returns 415
test.description: POST with an unsupported Content-Type (not a FHIR media type) must return 415 Unsupported Media Type.

operation.description: POST Observation with an unsupported Content-Type header

assert.description: Server must return 415 Unsupported Media Type

test.name: create with an invalid (incomplete) resource body returns 400
test.description: POST an Observation missing required elements (status, code) must return 400 Bad Request.

operation.description: POST an empty Observation

assert.description: Server must return 400 Bad Request

test.name: create with a malformed dateTime returns 400
test.description: POST an Observation with an invalid effectiveDateTime (date + timezone offset but no time) must return 400 Bad Request.

operation.description: POST Observation with malformed effectiveDateTime

assert.description: Server must return 400 Bad Request

test.name: create with a high-precision quantity value succeeds
test.description: POST an Observation with a high-precision decimal quantity value must succeed with 201 Created.

operation.description: POST Observation with a high-precision quantity value

assert.description: Server must return 201 Created

test.name: create tolerates a malicious query string on the collection URL
test.description: POST with a SQL-injection-style query string appended to the create URL must still succeed with 201 Created.

operation.description: POST Observation with a malicious query string appended to the URL

assert.description: Server must return 201 Created

test.name: create accepts sanitizable narrative text
test.description: POST an Observation whose narrative text contains injection-style text but no markup tags must succeed with 201 Created.

operation.description: POST Observation with fuzz-style (non-tag) narrative text

assert.description: Server must return 201 Created

test.name: create blocks a malicious narrative containing a script tag
test.description: POST an Observation whose narrative text contains a <script> tag must be rejected with 400 Bad Request, since Narrative.div only allows a restricted XHTML subset.

operation.description: POST Observation with a <script> tag in the narrative

assert.description: Server must return 400 Bad Request

test.name: update with an illegal id format returns 400
test.description: PUT with an id containing an underscore (illegal in the FHIR id format) must return 400 Bad Request.

operation.description: PUT Observation/fhir262-illegal_id (underscore makes the id illegal)

assert.description: Server must return 400 Bad Request for an illegal id format

test.name: create with a valid X-Provenance header links a Provenance resource
test.description: POST with a valid X-Provenance header must succeed with 201 Created and create a linked Provenance resource targeting the new Observation.

operation.description: POST Observation with a valid X-Provenance header

assert.description: Server must return 201 Created

operation.description: Search for the linked Provenance by target

assert.description: Provenance search must return HTTP 200
Provenance search response must be a Bundle
Bundle must contain at least one linked Provenance resource

test.name: create with a malformed X-Provenance header returns 400
test.description: POST with a malformed (non-JSON) X-Provenance header must return 400 Bad Request.

operation.description: POST Observation with a malformed X-Provenance header

assert.description: Server must return 400 Bad Request for a malformed X-Provenance header

operation.description: Teardown: delete the basic create-test Observation
Teardown: delete the client-id/meta-override Observation
Teardown: delete the high-precision quantity Observation
Teardown: delete the malicious-query-string Observation
Teardown: delete the safe-narrative Observation
Teardown: delete the X-Provenance-linked Observation
Teardown: attempt to delete the illegal-id Observation in case a lenient server accepted it
